zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Rohese de Bulles於1046年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易布洛斯時，她的父親Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare11歲，母親Rohese Giffard de Bolbec22歲。她和Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1120年1月7日在法國諾門迪享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of Buller , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Buller
meanings: English: variant of Bowler . The surname is unlikely to have been derived from Middle English buller(e) ‘maker or publisher of bulls or papal edicts’. It is recorded only in the phrase fals buller ‘publisher of false bulls’. Old French boleor, bouleur, from which the word was borrowed, more generally meant ‘deceiver, trickster’, so possibly it also had this sense in Middle English but there is no evidence for it.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullard  .
German (also Büller): nickname for a man with a loud voice, from an agent derivative of Middle High German büllen ‘to roar, to bark’ (of imitative origin).

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Rohese de Bulles was born in 1046, in Bulles, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare, was 11 and her mother, Rohese Giffard de Bolbec, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin. She died on 7 January 1120, in Normandy, France, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Rohese de Bulles est née en 1046, à Bulles, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Rohese Giffard de Bolbec, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1120, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Rohese de Bulles 1046 in Bulles, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare 11 und ihre Mutter Rohese Giffard de Bolbec 22. Sie hatte mit Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1120 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Rohese de Bulles è nata il nel 1046 nel Bulles, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Rohese Giffard de Bolbec, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin. Morì il 7 gennaio 1120, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Rohese de Bullesが1046年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼブレスで生まれた時，父Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clareは11歳，母Rohese Giffard de Bolbecは22歳であった。彼女はHugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1120年1月7日にフランスノーマンディで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Rohese de Bulles(이)가 1046년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 불레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese Giffard de Bolbec(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1120년 1월 7일 프랑스 노먼디에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clare, 3393, Suffolk, England, Royaume-U: Clare, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Rohese de Bulles nasceu em 1046, em Bulles, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Rohese Giffard de Bolbec, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1120, em Normandie, França, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Rohese de Bulles родилась в 1046 г. в местности буллесь, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese Giffard de Bolbec, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin. Она умерла 7 января 1120 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Rohese de Bulles nació en 1046, en Bulles, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Rohese Giffard de Bolbec, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin. Murió el 7 de enero de 1120, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 74 años.
